title: ngrok API Key
description: An API Key is used to authenticate requests to the ngrok API.

id.description: Unique identifier for the API key.

uri.description: URI of the API key resource.

description.description: Human-readable description of the API key.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the API key was created.

token.description: The API key token. Only present in the response to a create request.

owner_id.description: The owner of the API key, if owned by a bot user.
